name: zmg-zsj-skill
description: Z-Sight APP core capabilities: live streaming, variety shows, short videos, trending topics, app navigation, content publishing, and more

functions.name: search_live
functions.description: Search live streams by keyword, returns matching live room list

functions.name: search_variety
functions.description: Search variety shows by keyword, returns matching variety show list

functions.name: get_hot_live_list
functions.description: Get current hot live stream list

functions.name: watch_live_channel
functions.description: Watch TV channel live stream. Triggered when user wants to watch Zhejiang TV, Qianjiang, News channel, etc.

channel.description: Channel name, e.g. Zhejiang TV, Qianjiang, Economy & Life, Education, Minsheng, News, Kids, Zhejiang International, Haoyigou, Zhijiang Documentary

functions.name: get_live_detail
functions.description: Get live detail page URL by live ID. Triggered when user wants to watch a specific live room

functions.name: get_short_video_list
functions.description: Get trending short video list with pagination

functions.name: open_app_page
functions.description: Open Z-Sight APP to a specific page via schema protocol

functions.name: publish_post
functions.description: Publish a text & image post. Requires user authorization (QR code scan). Returns 401 if unauthorized; guide user to visit https://zmg-mcp.cztv.com to authorize

functions.name: publish_short_video
functions.description: Publish a short video. Requires user authorization (QR code scan). Returns 401 if unauthorized; guide user to visit https://zmg-mcp.cztv.com to authorize

functions.name: get_message_list
functions.description: Get message center list, supports mentions, comments/replies, and likes

functions.name: get_user_content_list
functions.description: Get user short video list. User identity is auto-detected from auth token; do NOT pass uid, accessUuid, or other user identifiers.

functions.name: get_user_post_list
functions.description: Get user post (text & image) list. User identity is auto-detected from auth token; do NOT pass uid, accessUuid, or other user identifiers.

functions.name: get_user_audio_list
functions.description: Get user audio list (e.g. KTV recordings). User identity is auto-detected from auth token; do NOT pass uid, accessUuid, or other user identifiers.

functions.name: delete_article
functions.description: Delete a user article (short video, post, or audio). Requires article ID obtained from get_user_content_list, get_user_post_list, or get_user_audio_list

article_id.description: Article ID, obtained from the id field of get_user_content_list/get_user_post_list/get_user_audio_list response
